title: MiniMax M3 explained in 8min..
summary: MiniMax released M3, a large language model featuring MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA) that replaces full attention with sparse attention. The model includes tiled I/O improvements and optimized KV cache handling for continuous reads, reducing latency in prefill and decode stages.
writeup: This video covers MiniMax M3, a language model that replaces full attention with MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA). It explains how the architecture pairs MSA with KV cache management and tiled I/O improvements to cut latency. The key takeaways: the sparse attention design and these optimizations reduce latency across both the prefill and decode stages of inference.
